summary: Successfully created Content Carts schema with content_carts and cart_items tables, including migration script and comprehensive Python helper functions. All functionality tested and verified.
learnings: Content Carts schema leverages existing items table from content_library.sql for foreign key relationships
Migration includes proper indexes for performance on cart queries and ordering operations
Helper functions support all CRUD operations plus cart management (archive, reorder, summary views)
Used UUID generation for consistent ID patterns across the system
Implemented proper foreign key constraints with CASCADE delete for data integrity

database_tables: content_carts (id, name, description, status, created_at, updated_at)
cart_items (id, cart_id, item_id, added_at, notes, order_index)
technical_details.testing: All functions tested with synthetic data, migration script validated on test database
